title: Delhi Heat Wave
lead: Delhi is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.86. The city's temperature is extremely high, scoring 10.0/10 on the heat index.
body:
The current heat wave in Delhi has reached critical levels, with a temperature anomaly that is significantly higher than usual. 
 The heat index score of 10.0/10 indicates a life-threatening heat wave, with temperatures soaring and humidity at 34%. 
 The wind speed of 13.0 km/h is not sufficient to provide relief from the heat, with CDD at 16.0 GG and HDD at 0.0 GG.
conclusion: Operational measures must be taken immediately to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
